name: devkit
domain: moai-adk-go dev-only maintainer tooling (CC upstream tracking, GitHub issue/PR workflow, production release)
source_request: 통합: dev-only 메인테이너 3-커맨드(97-release-update / 98-github / 99-release)를 단일 devkit 하네스로 통합한다. 전체 harness-v4 Builder로 빌드하고, Runner는 비-상호작용 fan-out만 모델링하며, 사람-게이트는 specialist 서브에이전트로 위임한다.

specialists.description: Claude Code upstream change tracker. Collects CC release notes since last analyzed version, classifies by impact tier, cross-references official docs, generates update plan or umbrella SPEC, syncs docs-site 4-locale + README, opens PR via manager-git. Human-gated: user approval + PR creation.

GitHub issue-fix and PR-review specialist. Uses gh CLI to discover/analyze issues, implement fixes with test verification, create PRs, perform multi-perspective PR reviews. Human-gated: PR creation approval + review submission gate.

Production release specialist. Enhanced GitHub Flow (release/vX.Y.Z branch, version bump, bilingual CHANGELOG, PR with merge commit, scripts/release.sh tag + GoReleaser). Human-gated: production release final approval.
